Yes, the reason is because pure ultra (4 ultra or ultra+chaos) relies on either using the ultra turn properly or leveraging the unique mechanics of specfic units in order to perform well. The standard dps units really need the utility from limited supports in order to function properly (jenkins wants joy for her x cost, liz wants hand size and anger/fear for her burst), while limited units sort of work better 'out of the box'
